updates.title: Voice Note & Media UX Refinements
updates.description: Fixed UI overlapping of voice note audio player and filename. Engineered robust auto-scroll logic that snaps to the newest incoming message and dynamically tracks uploading files to enhance immediate visual feedback.
updates.rationale: Resolves layout degradation and restores fluid messaging interactions for continuous, immersive chats.

updates.title: Full Filename Integrity (Thumb Rule)
updates.description: Removed truncation from Audio and Document filenames. Optimized layout to prevent overlap with metadata by implementing vertical stacking for long file identities.
updates.rationale: Ensures full technical visibility of file names while strictly adhering to the zero-overlap 'Thumb Rule'.

updates.title: Android Navigation Gesture capturing
updates.description: Implemented popstate history management. Android back gestures now close active modals instead of exiting the platform.
updates.rationale: Essential for native-feeling stability on mobile devices.

updates.title: Build Book Protocol & Theory Sync
updates.description: Implemented the full-screen immersive 'Build Book' and 'Build Theory' protocol for architectural transparency.
updates.rationale: Transitions logs to a prestigious technical record.

updates.title: Suspension: Front-Layer Spark Protocol
updates.description: Suspended the orange front-layer particle protocol to prioritize clean UI clarity and extreme mobile performance efficiency.
updates.rationale: User preference for absolute visual clarity and removal of decorative layers.

updates.title: Visual Identity & Doodle Layer
updates.description: Integrated custom WhatsApp-style background doodles and real-time upload feedback systems.

updates.title: PWA & Native Experience Optimization
updates.description: Configured manifest and service workers for high-fidelity native app installation experience. Optimized startup times.
updates.rationale: Novario transition from web-lite to web-native application status.

updates.title: Real-Time Presence Infrastructure
updates.description: Architected the Firestore 'Presence' collection for 🟢 Online/⚫ Offline status synchronization across global sessions.
updates.rationale: Enables immediate social awareness within the Novario ecosystem.

updates.title: Advanced File Retention Logic
updates.description: Engineered the 14-day retention cycle. Implemented logic to automatically purge text logs after 5 days while preserving media for the full term.
updates.rationale: Strategic balance between technical lightweighting and user data persistence.

updates.title: Cross-Platform Layout Refinement
updates.description: Initial engineering of the adaptive full-bleed wide-screen desktop layout and compact mobile view.
updates.rationale: Ensures usability across monitors, tablets, and handheld devices.

updates.title: Genesis: Novario/Ovii Protocol
updates.description: Initial architectural deployment of the secure, real-time messaging core utilizing Firebase synchronization.
updates.rationale: Foundation of the entire communication ecosystem.
